dashboard.cashFlowSubtitle: Money in vs. money out, last {{count}} months

landing.heroTitle: Money in, money out — always in view.
landing.heroSub: Moneytracer is the bookkeeping and finance tool for small businesses, community savings groups, and personal spending. Track sales and stock, run your chama's contributions, or manage your own budget — all from one simple dashboard.
landing.businessFeaturesTitle: Everything a small business needs to track its money
landing.businessFeaturesSub: From the till to the balance sheet, Moneytracer keeps your sales, stock, and cash flow organized without spreadsheets.
landing.communityFeaturesTitle: Built for chamas, table banking, and merry-go-rounds
landing.communityFeaturesSub: Stop tracking contributions in a notebook. Moneytracer gives your group a shared, accurate record every member can trust.
landing.personalFeaturesSub: Log a spend in seconds, see what's safe to spend today, and build better habits over time — your way, whether that's budgets, habits, or saving with friends.

businessFeatures.title: Point of Sale
businessFeatures.text: Fast multi-item checkout with live stock validation, built for the counter.

businessFeatures.title: Inventory
businessFeatures.text: Track stock levels, batch import products, and get low-stock alerts before you run out.

businessFeatures.title: Invoices & Quotations
businessFeatures.text: Send professional invoices and quotes, and turn accepted quotes into sales.

businessFeatures.title: Debtors & Creditors
businessFeatures.text: Know who owes you and who you owe, at a glance.

businessFeatures.title: Reports
businessFeatures.text: Profit & loss, financial summaries, and inventory valuation — always current.

businessFeatures.title: Activity Logs
businessFeatures.text: Full audit trail of who did what, so nothing slips through unnoticed.

communityFeatures.title: Member Management
communityFeatures.text: Add members, assign co-recorders, and give members their own read-only login.

communityFeatures.title: Contributions
communityFeatures.text: Record every member's savings contribution and see the group total update instantly.

communityFeatures.title: Payouts
communityFeatures.text: Track merry-go-round or dividend payouts fairly, with a full history per member.

communityFeatures.title: Group Loans
communityFeatures.text: Issue loans to members from group savings and track repayments to the shilling.

communityFeatures.title: Group Summary
communityFeatures.text: One clear view of total savings, loans out, and group health — for every meeting.

communityFeatures.title: Role-based Access
communityFeatures.text: Admins and recorders manage entries; members can always see their own records.

personalFeatures.title: Quick Expense Log
personalFeatures.text: Add a spend in seconds — amount, category, done. No spreadsheets, no friction.

personalFeatures.title: Envelope Budgets
personalFeatures.text: Set a monthly budget per category and always know what's safe to spend today.

personalFeatures.title: Spending Habits
personalFeatures.text: Tag spends as necessary or impulse and watch your habits improve week over week.

personalFeatures.title: Savings Goals
personalFeatures.text: Set a goal, track progress, and stay motivated with a clear visual finish line.

personalFeatures.title: Group Challenges
personalFeatures.text: Save together with friends toward a shared goal, with everyone's progress in view.

personalFeatures.title: Personal Insights
personalFeatures.text: See where your money actually goes, and which weeks or categories creep up.

landing.oneAccountTitle: One account, any way you need it
landing.oneAccountSub: Choose a business, community, or personal account when you sign up — the dashboard, roles, and reports adapt to fit.
landing.accountBusinessText: POS, inventory, invoicing, and reports for shops, traders, and service businesses of any size.
landing.accountCommunityText: Contributions, payouts, and group loans for savings groups and community finance circles.
landing.accountPersonalText: Budgets, habits, and savings goals for anyone who wants to spend more wisely, on their own or with friends.
landing.aboutTitle: Built for the way money actually moves
landing.aboutP1: Moneytracer started as a simple idea: the tools that help a shop owner, a savings group treasurer, or someone budgeting their own salary shouldn't require an accounting degree or a spreadsheet. Whether you're running a hardware store, managing a chama's monthly contributions, or just trying to see where your money goes, Moneytracer gives you one clear, honest record you can trust.
landing.aboutP2: We built it for African businesses and communities first — with multi-currency support across the continent, offline-friendly workflows, and pricing that makes sense for a small business, not a global enterprise. No jargon, no bloated features you'll never use — just the numbers that matter, always up to date.
landing.valueSimpleText: No training required. If you can use a phone, you can run your books on Moneytracer from day one.
landing.valueDataText: Every account is isolated and secured, with a full activity log so you always know who changed what.
landing.valueAfricaText: Local currencies, local realities — designed around how businesses and communities here actually operate.
landing.pricingTitle: Ready to get your finances in order?
landing.pricingSub: Create an account in minutes. No spreadsheet required.
landing.betaNoticeP1: Moneytracer is free to use for the first
landing.betaNoticeP2: while we're in active development. During this phase you may see day-to-day changes, occasional bugs, or brief downtime as we roll out improvements. We'll announce pricing plans well in advance of the beta period ending.
landing.disclaimerText: Moneytracer is currently in active development (beta). Use of the Service is subject to our full Terms of Use and Disclaimer, which cover data loss, warranty limitations, liability, and dispute resolution. Please read the complete terms before relying on the Service for business, community, or personal financial records.
landing.readFullTerms: Read the full Terms of Use & Disclaimer →
landing.availableInLanguages: Available in English, Français, Português, and Kiswahili.
